199:   // take care of misaligned words

201:   begin

207:     endcase
208:   end

210:   // sign extension for half words
211:   always_comb
212:   begin
213:     case (rdata_offset_q)
214:       2'b00:
215:       begin
216:         if (data_sign_ext_q == 1'b0)
217:           rdata_h_ext = {16'h0000, data_rdata_i[15:0]};

219:           rdata_h_ext = {{16{data_rdata_i[15]}}, data_rdata_i[15:0]};
220:       end
221: 
222:       2'b01:
223:       begin
224:         if (data_sign_ext_q == 1'b0)

228:       end
229: 
230:       2'b10:
231:       begin
232:         if (data_sign_ext_q == 1'b0)

236:       end

238:       2'b11:
239:       begin

244:       end
245:     endcase // case (rdata_offset_q)

258:       end
259:

261:         if (data_sign_ext_q == 1'b0)
262:           rdata_b_ext = {24'h00_0000, data_rdata_i[15:8]};
263:         else
264:           rdata_b_ext = {{24{data_rdata_i[15]}}, data_rdata_i[15:8]};
265:       end
266: 
267:       2'b10:
268:       begin
269:         if (data_sign_ext_q == 1'b0)
270:           rdata_b_ext = {24'h00_0000, data_rdata_i[23:16]};
271:         else
272:           rdata_b_ext = {{24{data_rdata_i[23]}}, data_rdata_i[23:16]};
273:       end

275:       2'b11:
276:       begin
277:         if (data_sign_ext_q == 1'b0)
278:           rdata_b_ext = {24'h00_0000, data_rdata_i[31:24]};
279:         else
280:           rdata_b_ext = {{24{data_rdata_i[31]}}, data_rdata_i[31:24]};
281:       end
282:     endcase // case (rdata_offset_q)
283:   end

151:         // offset FSM state
152:         always_ff @(posedge clk, negedge rst_n)
153:         begin
154:           if (rst_n == 1'b0) begin
155:             offset_fsm_cs     <= IDLE;
156:           end else begin
157:             offset_fsm_cs     <= offset_fsm_ns;
158:           end
159:         end
160: 
161:         // offset FSM state transition logic
162:         always_comb
163:         begin
164:           offset_fsm_ns = offset_fsm_cs;
165: 
166:           fetch_ready   = 1'b0;
167:           branch_req    = 1'b0;
168:           valid         = 1'b0;
169: 
170:           unique case (offset_fsm_cs)
171:             // no valid instruction data for ID stage
172:             // assume aligned
173:             IDLE: begin
174:               if (req_i) begin
175:                 branch_req    = 1'b1;
176:                 offset_fsm_ns = WAIT;
177:               end
178:             end
179: 
180:             // serving aligned 32 bit or 16 bit instruction, we don't know yet
181:             WAIT: begin
182:               if (fetch_valid) begin
183:                 valid   = 1'b1; // an instruction is ready for ID stage
184: 
185:                 if (req_i && if_valid_o) begin
186:                   fetch_ready   = 1'b1;
187:                   offset_fsm_ns = WAIT;
188:                 end
189:               end
190:             end
191: 
192:             default: begin
193:               offset_fsm_ns = IDLE;
194:             end
195:           endcase
196: 
197: 
198:           // take care of jumps and branches
199:           if (pc_set_i) begin
200:             valid = 1'b0;
201: 
202:             // switch to new PC from ID stage
203:             branch_req = 1'b1;
204:             offset_fsm_ns = WAIT;
205:           end
206:         end
207:

212:

214: 
215:         assign perf_imiss_o    = (~fetch_valid) | branch_req;
216: 
217: 
218:         // compressed instruction decoding, or more precisely compressed instruction
219:         // expander
220:         //
221:         // since it does not matter where we decompress instructions, we do it here
222:         // to ease timing closure
223:         logic [31:0] instr_decompressed;
224:         logic        illegal_c_insn;
225:         logic        instr_compressed_int;
226: 
227:         zeroriscy_compressed_decoder compressed_decoder_i
228:           (
229:             .instr_i         ( fetch_rdata          ),
230:             .instr_o         ( instr_decompressed   ),
231:             .is_compressed_o ( instr_compressed_int ),
232:             .illegal_instr_o ( illegal_c_insn       )
233:           );
234: 
235:         // IF-ID pipeline registers, frozen when the ID stage is stalled
236:         always_ff @(posedge clk, negedge rst_n)
237:         begin : IF_ID_PIPE_REGISTERS
238:           if (rst_n == 1'b0)
239:             begin
240:               instr_valid_id_o      <= 1'b0;
241:               instr_rdata_id_o      <= '0;
242:               illegal_c_insn_id_o   <= 1'b0;
243:               is_compressed_id_o    <= 1'b0;
244:               pc_id_o               <= '0;
245:             end
246:           else
247:             begin
248: 
249:               if (if_valid_o)
250:               begin
251:                   instr_valid_id_o    <= 1'b1;
252:                   instr_rdata_id_o    <= instr_decompressed;
253:                   illegal_c_insn_id_o <= illegal_c_insn;
254:                   is_compressed_id_o  <= instr_compressed_int;
255:                   pc_id_o             <= pc_if_o;
256:               end else if (clear_instr_valid_i) begin
257:                 instr_valid_id_o    <= 1'b0;
258:               end
259: 
260:             end
261:         end
262:

264:         assign if_ready = valid & id_ready_i;
265:         assign if_valid_o = (~halt_if_i) & if_ready;

27: `include "zeroriscy_config.sv"
28: 
29: module zeroriscy_register_file
30: #(
31:   parameter RV32E         = 0,
32:   parameter DATA_WIDTH    = 32
33: )
34: (
35:   // Clock and Reset
36:   input  logic                   clk,
37:   input  logic                   rst_n,
38: 
39:   input  logic                   test_en_i,
40: 
41:   //Read port R1
42:   input  logic [4:0]             raddr_a_i,
43:   output logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0]  rdata_a_o,
44: 
45:   //Read port R2
46:   input  logic [4:0]             raddr_b_i,
47:   output logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0]  rdata_b_o,
48: 
49: 
50:   // Write port W1
51:   input  logic [4:0]              waddr_a_i,
52:   input  logic [DATA_WIDTH-1:0]   wdata_a_i,
53:   input  logic                    we_a_i
54: 
55: );
56: 
57:   localparam    ADDR_WIDTH = RV32E ? 4 : 5;
58:   localparam    NUM_WORDS  = 2**ADDR_WIDTH;
59: 
60:   logic [NUM_WORDS-1:0][DATA_WIDTH-1:0] rf_reg;
61:   logic [NUM_WORDS-1:0][DATA_WIDTH-1:0] rf_reg_tmp;
62:   logic [NUM_WORDS-1:0]                 we_a_dec;
63: 
64:   always_comb
65:   begin : we_a_decoder
66:     for (int i = 0; i < NUM_WORDS; i++) begin
67:       if (waddr_a_i == i)
68:         we_a_dec[i] = we_a_i;
69:       else
70:         we_a_dec[i] = 1'b0;
71:     end
72:   end
73: 
74: 
75:   genvar i;
76:   generate
77: 
78:     // loop from 1 to NUM_WORDS-1 as R0 is nil
79:     for (i = 1; i < NUM_WORDS; i++)
80:     begin : rf_gen
81: 
82:       always_ff @(posedge clk, negedge rst_n)
83:       begin : register_write_behavioral
84:         if (rst_n==1'b0) begin
85:           rf_reg_tmp[i] <= 'b0;
86:         end else begin
87:           if (we_a_dec[i])
88:             rf_reg_tmp[i] <= wdata_a_i;
89:         end
90:       end
